ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_title" TEXT /* Title of the study (e.g., Lee et al. (2013)) */,
  "study_year" INTEGER /* Year the study was published */,
  "risk_of_bias" TEXT /* Risk of bias in the study (e.g., Low risk of bias) */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of study (e.g., randomized controlled trial) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution conducting the study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "publication_link" TEXT /* Link to the published study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the patient is part of */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient (e.g., male, female) */,
  "age" REAL /* Average age of the patient */,
  "age_std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the age (if applicable) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "BMI" REAL /* Body Mass Index of the patient */,
  "comorbidities" TEXT /* Comorbid conditions (e.g., diabetes, hypertension) */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status (e.g., smoker, non-smoker) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surgical_procedures" (
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each surgical procedure */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the procedure is part of */,
  "procedure_name" TEXT /* Name of the surgical procedure (e.g., ESS, rhinoplasty, septoplasty) */,
  "underlying_disease" TEXT /* Underlying medical condition of the patient (e.g., no cardiovascular disease) */,
  "procedure_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the surgical procedure in minutes */,
  "anesthesia_type" TEXT /* Type of anesthesia used (e.g., general, local) */,
  "surgeon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the surgeon performing the procedure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("procedure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surgical_procedures_surgeon_id FOREIGN KEY ("surgeon_id") REFERENCES surgeons ("surgeon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surgical_procedures_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the comparison is part of */,
  "agent_1" TEXT /* First anesthetic agent in the comparison (e.g., Dexmedetomidine) */,
  "agent_2" TEXT /* Second anesthetic agent in the comparison (e.g., remifentanil, saline) */,
  "comparison_type" TEXT /* Type of comparison (e.g., head-to-head, placebo-controlled) */,
  "dosage_agent_1" TEXT /* Dosage of the first anesthetic agent */,
  "dosage_agent_2" TEXT /* Dosage of the second anesthetic agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcome_measures" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome measure */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the outcome measure is part of */,
  "outcome_measure" TEXT /* Name of the outcome measure (e.g., Surgical time, Adverse effects) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the outcome measure (e.g., Low risk of bias) */,
  "measure_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome measure (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement (e.g., minutes, percentage) */,
  "statistical_significance" TEXT /* Statistical significance of the result (e.g., p-value) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcome_measures_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adverse_effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adverse effect */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the adverse effect is part of */,
  "adverse_effect" TEXT /* Name of the adverse effect (e.g., hypotension, PONV) */,
  "incidence" TEXT /* Incidence of the adverse effect (e.g., Low risk of bias) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the adverse effect (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "management" TEXT /* Management strategy for the adverse effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adverse_effects_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surgeons" (
  "surgeon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each surgeon */,
  "surgeon_name" TEXT /* Name of the surgeon */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the surgeon (e.g., cardiothoracic surgery) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the surgeon practices */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("surgeon_id")
)
